_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: When regression models are built by correlating the docking scores of the 8 or 11 compounds to their functional effects...show a regression line with a negative slope, indicating the lack of any correlation
details: Docking-based models showed poor correlation with functional effects, with regression lines having negative slopes indicating lack of correlation between predicted scores and inhibitory power
